economic_notes: Nation has investments in multiple LPs including Tsu Aggregates LP, NSE Development (Phase 2) LP, Tsuubaa Pacific Civil Projects LP, Tsu-SDK Contracting LP, Tsu Holdings LP, and gaming revenue partnership. New investments in VIG Project BC GP LP and VIG Project BC Ltd. (WIPG) during 2024.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to Hul'q'humi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership financial information not being available and not consolidated. This entity is accounted for on modified equity basis but no current year financials were available. Nation has 6 fully consolidated funds/segments and 9 entities on modified equity basis. Prior year (2023) revenue appears significantly lower at $4.16M vs $9.03M in 2024 — may reflect restated or reorganized reporting. Housing expenses split between Band Housing ($130,399), Social Housing ($1,654,362), Band Housing ($31,233), Social Housing ($100,111) totaling $1,916,105. Replacement Reserve Fund is under-funded by $3,130. Youth Trust Fund balance of $191,781 is not reflected in financial statements as it is held in trust.
